text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei reiterated that Lebanon is a core part of the ceasefire agreement with the United States: "The basis of the agreement that was reached was the ceasefire. The cessation of war on all fronts, including…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei stated that contact with Pakistan is ongoing to resolve the Lebanon issue: "In the past few days, this discussion has been raised rapidly since we arrived here yesterday, and the connection between Islamabad and Beirut has been continuously established." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊重申，黎巴嫩是与美国达成的停火协议的核心部分：‘达成的协议基础是停火。在所有战线停止战争，包括……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊表示，正在与巴基斯坦进行接触以解决黎巴嫩问题：“过去几天里，自从我们昨天抵达这里以来，这一讨论被迅速提出，伊斯兰堡和贝鲁特之间的联系已持续建立。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei stated that until now there has been no major ceasefire violation against Iran: "From that time until now, we have not received a report indicating that there has been a serious violation of the…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei reiterated that Lebanon is a core part of the ceasefire agreement with the United States: "The basis of the agreement that was reached was the ceasefire. The cessation of war on all fronts, including in Lebanon, was a part of the ceasefire." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊表示，到目前为止，尚未收到针对伊朗的重大停火违规报告：‘从那时到现在，我们没有收到任何表明存在严重违规的报告……’” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊重申，黎巴嫩是与美国达成的停火协议的核心部分：“达成的协议基础是停火。在所有战线（包括黎巴嫩）停止战争是停火协议的一部分。” @wfwitness

text: Trump: Iran is a failing nation.
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗是一个失败的国家。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei stated that the Iranian armed forces have responded to several ceasefire violations: "There were several violations of the ceasefire, and our armed forces responded decisively, quickly and with…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei stated that until now there has been no major ceasefire violation against Iran: "From that time until now, we have not received a report indicating that there has been a serious violation of the ceasefire against Iran." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊表示，伊朗武装部队已对几次停火违规行为作出了回应：‘停火有几次违规，我们的武装部队果断、迅速且以……作出了回应’” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊表示，到目前为止，尚未收到针对伊朗的重大停火违规报告：“从那时到现在，我们没有收到任何表明存在针对伊朗的严重停火违规的报告。” @wfwitness

text: Iranian media say Tehran has set its red lines in talks via Pakistan: control over the Strait of Hormuz, war reparations, release of frozen assets, and a genuine, stable ceasefire across relevant regions.
text_zh: 伊朗媒体称，德黑兰已通过巴基斯坦在谈判中设定了红线：控制霍尔木兹海峡、战争赔偿、解冻资产，以及在相关地区实现真正、稳定的停火。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baqaei on Iran's stance on the alleged ceasefire violations: "We emphasized from the beginning that when we say ceasefire, it really means a ceasefire." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei stated that the Iranian armed forces have responded to several ceasefire violations: "There were several violations of the ceasefire, and our armed forces responded decisively, quickly and with all their strength." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊就伊朗对所谓停火违规的立场表示：‘我们从一开始就强调，当我们说停火时，它确实意味着停火。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊表示，伊朗武装部队已对几次停火违规行为作出了回应：“停火有几次违规，我们的武装部队果断、迅速且全力以赴地作出了回应。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei gave a update on the ongoing discussions with Pakistani mediators: I would like to briefly inform you that last Saturday morning, the delegation of the Islamic Republic of Iran, headed by Mr. Qalibaf…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Esmail Baqaei on Iran's stance on the alleged ceasefire violations: "We emphasized from the beginning that when we say ceasefire, it really means a ceasefire." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊就与巴基斯坦调解人的持续讨论提供了最新情况：我想简要告知大家，上周六上午，由卡利巴夫先生率领的伊朗伊斯兰共和国代表团……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊就伊朗对所谓停火违规的立场表示：“我们从一开始就强调，当我们说停火时，它确实意味着停火。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇦🇪 ⚡️ Joke of the day UAE’s Mishal Kanoo: “We don’t retaliate against Iran because we don’t want the Iranian people to remember us as an attacker!”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇦🇪 ⚡️ 今日笑话 阿联酋的米沙尔·卡努：“我们不对伊朗进行报复，因为我们不想让伊朗人民把我们记住为攻击者！”

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iranian Foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei gave a update on the ongoing discussions with Pakistani mediators: I would like to briefly inform you that last Saturday morning, the delegation of the Islamic Republic of Iran, headed by Mr. Qalibaf, arrived in Islamabad. They were received by the Minister of Foreign Affairs and Deputy Prime Minister of Pakistan, the Commander-in-Chief of the Pakistan Army, the Speaker of the Parliament, and the Minister of Interior. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗外交部发言人伊斯梅尔·巴盖伊就与巴基斯坦调解人的持续讨论提供了最新情况：我想简要告知大家，上周六上午，由卡利巴夫先生率领的伊朗伊斯兰共和国代表团抵达伊斯兰堡。他们受到了巴基斯坦外交部长兼副总理、巴基斯坦陆军总司令、议会议长和内政部长的接待。 @wfwitness

text: Nuno Felix RT @esaspaceflight : @esa @AirbusSpace @NASAArtemis Thanks for the shout-out @astro_reid ! Safe travels from your European friends at @esa and @AirbusSpace 💞 https://twitter.com/esaspaceflight/status/2042680633848213882/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @esaspaceflight : @esa @AirbusSpace @NASAArtemis 感谢 @astro_reid 的提及！祝你们在 @esa 和 @AirbusSpace 的欧洲朋友们旅途平安 💞 https://twitter.com/esaspaceflight/status/2042680633848213882/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Nuno Felix RT @ArianeGroup : 🚀 ArianeGroup technology propelled the Artemis II mission to the Moon and back Mission success for Artemis II! The crew aboard the Orion spacecraft has safely returned to Earth after orbiting the Moon. On their 10-day journey, Orion’s crew module was propelled and supplied with energy and vital resources by the European Service Module (ESM), to which ArianeGroup and several of our sites have made significant contributions. ▶️ The propulsion subsystems manufactured in Lampoldshausen ▶️ High-pressure helium tanks in Issac ▶️ Propellant tanks and technical assistance in Bremen ▶️ Avionics assistance and testing in Les Mureaux ▶️ The complete final assembly of the module by ArianeGroup teams in the cleanroom at the Bremen site Behind these key technologies provided to the ESM for the prime contractor @AirbusDefence @AirbusSpace on behalf of the @esa, ArianeGroup demonstrates its ability to craft human-rated systems with chemical propulsion system, designed for long duration missions to Moon and Mars for example. #RocketMakers tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Nuno Felix 转推 @ArianeGroup : 🚀 阿丽亚娜集团（ArianeGroup）的技术推动了阿尔忒弥斯2号（Artemis II）任务往返月球。阿尔忒弥斯2号任务成功！猎户座飞船上的机组人员在绕月飞行后已安全返回地球。在他们为期10天的旅程中，猎户座的乘员舱由欧洲服务舱（ESM）提供动力和能源及重要资源，阿丽亚娜集团和我们的几个基地为此做出了重大贡献。 ▶️ 在兰波尔茨豪森制造的推进子系统 ▶️ 在伊萨克的高压氦气罐 ▶️ 在不来梅的推进剂罐和技术支持 ▶️ 在莱米罗的航空电子设备支持和测试 ▶️ 由阿丽亚娜集团团队在不来梅基地洁净室完成的模块最终组装 阿丽亚娜集团代表 @esa 为主承包商 @AirbusDefence @AirbusSpace 提供这些关键技术，展示了其制造载人化学推进系统的能力，该系统专为长期月球和火星任务设计。 #RocketMakers 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @LMSpace : Thanks for the ride, @esa. 🥹 We should do this again soon. https://twitter.com/LMSpace/status/1601985429770829829/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @LMSpace : 感谢你的搭载，@esa。🥹 我们应该很快再做一次。 https://twitter.com/LMSpace/status/1601985429770829829/video/1 推文

text: WarTranslated First footage from the pre-Easter POW exchange. 182 Ukrainians are home including 25 officers Russia had refused to swap, most held since 2022, many from Mariupol and several National Guardsmen seized at Chornobyl. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042926384977203435/photo/1 Reports of a 175 for 175 POW swap. Awaiting official confirmation. - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 复活节前战俘交换的首批画面。182名乌克兰人回家了，其中包括俄罗斯拒绝交换的25名军官，大多数人自2022年以来一直被关押，许多人来自马里乌波尔，还有几名在切尔诺贝利被俘的国民警卫队员。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042926384977203435/photo/1 有报道称进行了175对175的战俘交换。等待官方确认。 - WarTranslated 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NewsNation: U.S. President Trump stated that massive numbers of oil tankers are heading to the United States to load up with American oil, not because Iran is failing to reopen the Strait of Hormuz – which he said will open “in the not too distant future” – but because people are seeing alternatives. He called Iran a “failing nation.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 NewsNation：美国总统特朗普表示，大量的油轮正前往美国装载美国石油，这并不是因为伊朗未能重新开放霍尔木兹海峡——他说海峡“在不久的将来”会开放——而是因为人们看到了替代方案。他称伊朗是一个“失败的国家”。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶 Iraq’s parliament has started voting to elect a new president after months of political deadlock. Parliamentary Speaker Halbousi said the number of candidates has dropped to 17 after the withdrawal of Aso Faridoun Ali. Outgoing president Abdul Latif…" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 An altercation broke out in the Iraqi parliament during the presidential election session. PDK MP Ikhlas al‑Dulaimi objected to the proceedings due to lack of quorum, and Speaker Mohammed al‑Halbousi responded then proceeded to eject her from the session. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶 伊拉克议会在经历了数月的政治僵局后，已开始投票选举新总统。议长哈尔布西表示，在阿索·法里敦·阿里退出后，候选人人数已降至17人。即将卸任的总统阿卜杜勒·拉蒂夫……” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 伊拉克议会在总统选举会议期间发生了争执。库尔德民主党（PDK）议员伊赫拉斯·杜莱米因缺乏法定人数对程序提出异议，议长穆罕默德·哈尔布西作出回应，随后将她逐出会场。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 Trump promotes US oil and gas on Truth Social, calling it the “sweetest” in the world.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普在“真实社交”（Truth Social）上推广美国石油和天然气，称其为世界上“最甜”的。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 Footage shows destruction on a railway near the city of Zanjan in north‑western Iran following an Israeli strike. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iranian construction workers have repaired several railway bridges damaged during the war. These bridges are a critical part of the Iranian railway infrastructure and thus broader economy. Footage shows repairs to a bridge in the Qom and Alborz province. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇮🇷 画面显示，在以色列袭击后，伊朗西北部赞詹市附近的一条铁路遭到破坏。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗建筑工人修复了几座在战争中受损的铁路桥梁。这些桥梁是伊朗铁路基础设施乃至更广泛经济的关键部分。画面显示了库姆省和阿尔伯兹省一座桥梁的修复情况。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Fars correspondent dispatched to Islamabad: The talks between Vance and the Prime Minister of Pakistan have concluded, and the media are awaiting the announcement of the results. If Iran's preconditions are not accepted, the negotiations will not take place.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 法尔斯通讯社记者派往伊斯兰堡：万斯与巴基斯坦总理的会谈已经结束，媒体正在等待结果公布。如果伊朗的先决条件不被接受，谈判将不会进行。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Uncertainty Over Release of Iran’s Frozen Assets 🔹 As possible Iran-US negotiations in Islamabad approach, conflicting reports have emerged about Tehran’s key precondition: the release of frozen assets. 🔹 Reuters recently reported the assets had been freed, but CBS News quoted White House officials saying Washington opposes the move. This comes as Iran’s delegation, led by Qalibaf, is in Islamabad for final assessments. 🔹 Iranian sources told Tasnim and Fars: “The Americans have messaged via intermediaries that the assets are released, but the Iranian team has not yet confirmed it.” 🔸 Iran has set two main red lines for talks: a full ceasefire in Lebanon and the complete release of its blocked assets. 🔹 Without these being clearly met, Iranian officials still call the talks “possible” and believe negotiations would be pointless otherwise. 🔸 Qalibaf previously stated that both the Lebanon ceasefire and asset release must happen before negotiations begin.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗被冻结资产释放的不确定性 🔹 随着伊朗与美国可能在伊斯兰堡进行的谈判临近，关于德黑兰的关键先决条件——释放被冻结资产——出现了相互矛盾的报道。 🔹 路透社最近报道称资产已被解冻，但哥伦比亚广播公司（CBS）援引白宫官员的话称，华盛顿反对这一举措。与此同时，由卡利巴夫率领的伊朗代表团正在伊斯兰堡进行最终评估。 🔹 伊朗消息人士告诉塔斯尼姆通讯社和法尔斯通讯社：“美国人通过中间人传话称资产已释放，但伊朗团队尚未确认。” 🔸 伊朗为谈判设定了两条主要红线：黎巴嫩全面停火和完全释放其被封锁的资产。 🔹 如果这些条件得不到明确满足，伊朗官员仍称谈判是“可能的”，并认为否则谈判将毫无意义。 🔸 卡利巴夫此前曾表示，黎巴嫩停火和资产释放必须在谈判开始前实现。

text: Trump: Massive numbers of completely empty oil tankers, some of the largest anywhere in the World, are heading, right now, to the United States to load up with the best and “sweetest” oil (and gas!) anywhere in the World. We have more oil than the next two largest oil economies combined - and higher quality. We are waiting for you. Quick turnaround!
text_zh: 特朗普：大量的空油轮，其中一些是世界上最大型的，现在正前往美国，装载世界上最好和“最甜”的石油（和天然气！）。我们拥有的石油比接下来的两个最大石油经济体加起来还要多，而且质量更高。我们正在等你们。快速周转！

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump said that massive numbers of empty oil tankers are heading to the United States to load up with American oil, which he described as the best and “sweetest” in the world. “We have more oil than the next two largest oil economies combined – and higher quality,” he wrote. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普表示，大量的空油轮正前往美国装载美国石油，他将其描述为世界上最好和“最甜”的石油。“我们拥有的石油比接下来的两个最大石油经济体加起来还要多，而且质量更高，”他写道。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🌟 Hossein Pak, a reporter in the resistance field: At the negotiation site in Islamabad, Pakistan, I learned that the Iranian delegation is in constant contact and coordination with the Islamic resistance in Lebanon, closely monitoring the enemy’s aggressions and the resistance’s responses moment by moment in order to make the necessary decisions regarding the negotiation process.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🌟 抵抗领域记者侯赛因·帕克：在巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡的谈判现场，我了解到伊朗代表团与黎巴嫩伊斯兰抵抗组织保持着持续的联系和协调，时刻密切关注敌人的侵略和抵抗组织的反应，以便就谈判进程做出必要的决定。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶 Iraq’s parliament has started voting to elect a new president after months of political deadlock. Parliamentary Speaker Halbousi said the number of candidates has dropped to 17 after the withdrawal of Aso Faridoun Ali. Outgoing president Abdul Latif…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Fars News Agency: There is confusion over the release of frozen Iranian assets ahead of possible US‑Iran talks in Islamabad. Contradictory reports have emerged: Reuters cited sources saying the assets have been freed, while CBS News quoted White House officials denying any such agreement. Iranian sources told Fars that the U.S. has messaged via mediators that the assets have been released, but Tehran has not confirmed this. Iran insists on two red lines before any talks: a full ceasefire in Lebanon and the complete release of frozen Iranian assets. Iranian officials continue to refer to “potential talks” as these conditions have not yet been met. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶 伊拉克议会在经历了数月的政治僵局后，已开始投票选举新总统。议长哈尔布西表示，在阿索·法里敦·阿里退出后，候选人人数已降至17人。即将卸任的总统阿卜杜勒·拉蒂夫也撤回了提名……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 法尔斯通讯社：在美伊可能于伊斯兰堡举行会谈之前，关于释放伊朗被冻结资产的消息一片混乱。出现了相互矛盾的报道：路透社援引消息人士称资产已被解冻，而哥伦比亚广播公司（CBS）援引白宫官员的话否认了任何此类协议。伊朗消息人士告诉法尔斯通讯社，美国已通过调解人传话称资产已释放，但德黑兰尚未确认。伊朗坚持在任何谈判前必须有两条红线：黎巴嫩全面停火和完全释放伊朗被冻结资产。由于这些条件尚未满足，伊朗官员继续称之为“潜在谈判”。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 Russia and Ukraine conducted another prisonner exchange today. Both sides released 175 POWs. The UAE mediated the deal. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇷🇺 🇺🇦 俄罗斯和乌克兰今天进行了另一次战俘交换。双方各释放了175名战俘。阿联酋调解了这项协议。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇦 Ukrainians organized some kind of a performance again 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 乌克兰人又组织了一场表演 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶 Iraq’s parliament has convened to elect a new president, with quorum likely achieved. Leaders of the Taqaddum and Azm coalitions, Mohammed al‑Halbousi and Muthanna al‑Samarrai, arrived at the building. First Deputy Speaker Adnan Faihan entered the…" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Iraq’s parliament has started voting to elect a new president after months of political deadlock. Parliamentary Speaker Halbousi said the number of candidates has dropped to 17 after the withdrawal of Aso Faridoun Ali. Outgoing president Abdul Latif Jamal Rashid also withdrew his nomination. Current predictions are that PUK candidate Nizar Amedi will win the vote against PDK candidate Iraqi Foreign Minister Fuad Hussain. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶 伊拉克议会已召开会议选举新总统，法定人数可能已达到。塔卡杜姆（Taqaddum）和阿兹姆（Azm）联盟的领导人穆罕默德·哈尔布西和穆萨纳·萨马赖抵达大楼。第一副议长阿德南·法汉进入……” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 伊拉克议会在经历了数月的政治僵局后，已开始投票选举新总统。议长哈尔布西表示，在阿索·法里敦·阿里退出后，候选人人数已降至17人。即将卸任的总统阿卜杜勒·拉蒂夫·贾迈勒·拉希德也撤回了提名。目前的预测是，库尔德斯坦爱国联盟（PUK）候选人尼扎尔·阿梅迪将赢得对阵库尔德民主党（PDK）候选人、伊拉克外交部长福阿德·侯赛因的投票。 @wfwitness

text: WarTranslated Anti-Orban protests are still going in Hungary. Around 100,000 rallied in Budapest, urging a vote against Orban and chanting "Ruszkik haza". https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042925118632989076/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 反欧尔班的抗议活动仍在匈牙利进行。约10万人聚集在布达佩斯，敦促投票反对欧尔班，并高呼“俄罗斯人滚回家”。 https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042925118632989076/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 According to CBS News, a senior U.S. official stated that the United States has not agreed to release any frozen Iranian assets. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2042924213841879040/photo/1 tweet

text: Liveuamap Ukraine and Russia carried out a prisoner exchange, with 175 Ukrainians returning home, President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said. Those freed include servicemen, National Guard members, border guards, and seven civilians https://liveuamap.com/en/2026/11-april-10-ukraine-and-russia-carried-out-a-prisoner-exchange tweet
text_zh: Liveuamap 乌克兰总统弗拉基米尔·泽连斯基表示，乌克兰和俄罗斯进行了战俘交换，175名乌克兰人返回家园。获释者包括军人、国民警卫队成员、边防警卫和七名平民 https://liveuamap.com/en/2026/11-april-10-ukraine-and-russia-carried-out-a-prisoner-exchange 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸🇱🇧 Nournews: Iranian officials have held closed‑door talks in Islamabad with Pakistan’s prime minister and parliament speaker, stressing the release of frozen Iranian assets and a “real and tangible” ceasefire in Lebanon. U.S. officials have reportedly…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 Iran has communicated its red lines to Pakistani mediators ahead of potential U.S. talks. The core demands are: 1. Control and sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz. 2. Payment of war reparations for damages caused during the conflict. 3. The release of all frozen Iranian assets. 4. A comprehensive, sustainable and tangible ceasefire across the entire region, not limited to any single front. Tehran insists these conditions must be met before any final agreement. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰🇺🇸🇱🇧 Nournews：伊朗官员在伊斯兰堡与巴基斯坦总理和议长举行了闭门会谈，强调释放伊朗被冻结资产以及在黎巴嫩实现‘真实且切实’的停火。据报道，美国官员……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 伊朗在潜在的美国谈判前已向巴基斯坦调解人传达了其红线。核心要求是：1. 对霍尔木兹海峡的控制权和主权。2. 支付冲突期间造成的损失的战争赔偿。3. 释放所有被冻结的伊朗资产。4. 在整个地区实现全面、可持续和切实的停火，而不局限于任何单一战线。德黑兰坚持在达成任何最终协议前必须满足这些条件。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Advanced LAIRCM system in Iran's hands. This system was supposed to protect large aircraft like the C-130 against heat-seeking weapons. AN/AAQ-24 LAIRCM.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗手中掌握了先进的LAIRCM系统。该系统旨在保护C-130等大型飞机免受热寻的武器的攻击。AN/AAQ-24 LAIRCM。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇶☀️🇮🇶🇮🇷☀️☀️ Iraq’s parliament is set to convene on Saturday 11 April to elect a new president, but deep political divisions threaten the session. In Iraq’s Muhasasa (sectarian power-sharing) system, the presidency is the “gatekeeper” — elected first in…" ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Iraq’s parliament has convened to elect a new president, with quorum likely achieved. Leaders of the Taqaddum and Azm coalitions, Mohammed al‑Halbousi and Muthanna al‑Samarrai, arrived at the building. First Deputy Speaker Adnan Faihan entered the main hall as Kurdish parties (PUK and KDP) held a last‑minute meeting to agree on a candidate. Hoquq Movement MP Ahmed Salem warned against entering a “dark tunnel." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇶☀️🇮🇶🇮🇷☀️☀️ 伊拉克议会定于4月11日星期六召开会议选举新总统，但深刻的政治分歧威胁着会议。在伊拉克的穆哈萨萨（宗派权力分享）制度中，总统是‘守门人’——首先选举……” ⚡️ 🇮🇶 伊拉克议会已召开会议选举新总统，法定人数可能已达到。塔卡杜姆（Taqaddum）和阿兹姆（Azm）联盟的领导人穆罕默德·哈尔布西和穆萨纳·萨马赖抵达大楼。第一副议长阿德南·法汉进入主厅，库尔德政党（PUK和KDP）举行了最后一刻的会议以就候选人达成一致。权利运动（Hoquq Movement）议员艾哈迈德·萨利姆警告不要进入“黑暗隧道”。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 The U.S. has not agreed to release any Iranian frozen assets, according to CBS. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 Iran’s government spokesperson Fatemeh Mohajerani said Iran will negotiate “with its finger on the trigger”. She stated that Iran will neither retreat from its rights nor back down. The dispatch of a diplomatic team headed by parliamentary speaker…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 Nournews: Iranian officials have held closed‑door talks in Islamabad with Pakistan’s prime minister and parliament speaker, stressing the release of frozen Iranian assets and a “real and tangible” ceasefire in Lebanon. U.S. officials have reportedly agreed in principle to the release of assets, though no official confirmation has been made. Pakistan is acting as mediator to determine the details of any future US‑Iran talks. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸 伊朗政府发言人法特梅·莫哈杰拉尼表示，伊朗将‘手指扣在扳机上’进行谈判。她表示，伊朗既不会放弃其权利，也不会退缩。由议长率领的外交团队的派遣……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 Nournews：伊朗官员在伊斯兰堡与巴基斯坦总理和议长举行了闭门会谈，强调释放伊朗被冻结资产以及在黎巴嫩实现‘真实且切实’的停火。据报道，美国官员原则上同意释放资产，尽管尚未得到官方确认。巴基斯坦正在担任调解人，以确定未来任何美伊谈判的细节。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇦 🔁 🇷🇺 Russia and Ukraine have carried out an exchange of prisoners of war. 175 Russian servicemen were returned to the Russian side. In exchange, 175 prisoners of war of the Armed Forces of Ukraine were handed over. Seven residents of the Kursk region who were illegally detained by the Kiev regime have also been returned and will be taken home. Currently, Russian servicemen are in Belarus, where they are receiving the necessary psychological and medical assistance. The UAE has provided mediation efforts of a humanitarian nature. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 🔁 🇷🇺 俄罗斯和乌克兰进行了战俘交换。175名俄罗斯军人被送回俄罗斯一方。作为交换，175名乌克兰武装部队的战俘被移交。七名被基辅政权非法拘留的库尔斯克地区居民也被送回，并将被带回家。目前，俄罗斯军人在白俄罗斯，在那里他们正在接受必要的心理和医疗援助。阿联酋提供了人道主义性质的调解努力。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Iranian delegation in Islamabad 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 伊朗代表团在伊斯兰堡 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to Clash Report: "BREAKING: The United States has agreed to release frozen Iranian assets. Tehran views the release of its assets as a test of goodwill and a new indication toward reaching a lasting agreement. Source: Reuters" White House official: Reports regarding approval to release Iranian assets are false claims.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Clash Report：“快讯：美国已同意释放伊朗被冻结的资产。德黑兰将资产的释放视为对其善意的考验，也是迈向达成持久协议的新迹象。来源：路透社” 白宫官员：关于批准释放伊朗资产的报道是虚假声明。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 A White House official told Reuters that the United States has not agreed to release frozen Iranian assets. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran’s government spokesperson Fatemeh Mohajerani said Iran will negotiate “with its finger on the trigger”. She stated that Iran will neither retreat from its rights nor back down. The dispatch of a diplomatic team headed by parliamentary speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf shows Iran’s determination for dialogue, but without trust. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 一位白宫官员告诉路透社，美国尚未同意释放伊朗被冻结的资产。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗政府发言人法特梅·莫哈杰拉尼表示，伊朗将‘手指扣在扳机上’进行谈判。她表示，伊朗既不会放弃其权利，也不会退缩。由议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫率领的外交团队的派遣显示了伊朗进行对话的决心，但缺乏信任。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ “You Are Not Our Compatriot!”: Iranian Journalist Rejects BBC’s Kasra Naji in Islamabad Amid a large gathering of journalists from around the world, an interesting encounter took place between BBC correspondent Kasra Naji and Iranian journalists. When Kasra Naji asked Kian Abdollahi, editor-in-chief of Tasnim, “Why won’t you shake my hand?” , he received a notable reply: “We are Iranian!” Kasra Naji said in Persian, “Aren’t we Iranian too?” This time, the Iranian journalist shook his head in disappointment and said: “You are not our compatriot!” Yes, speaking Persian is not the criterion; a journalist who stands in the occupied territories alongside the Zionist regime is not our compatriot!
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ “你不是我们的同胞！”：伊朗记者在伊斯兰堡拒绝了英国广播公司（BBC）的卡斯拉·纳吉。在来自世界各地的记者聚集在一起时，BBC记者卡斯拉·纳吉与伊朗记者之间发生了一次有趣的相遇。当卡斯拉·纳吉问塔斯尼姆通讯社主编基安·阿卜杜拉希：“你为什么不和我握手？”时，他得到了一个值得注意的回答：“我们是伊朗人！”卡斯拉·纳吉用波斯语说：“难道我们不是伊朗人吗？”这一次，这位伊朗记者失望地摇了摇头说：“你不是我们的同胞！”是的，说波斯语不是标准；一个站在被占领土上与犹太复国主义政权站在一起的记者不是我们的同胞！

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Prof. Marandi: People should not worry; our negotiation team will not be deceived 🔹 Our negotiators are like missile launcher officers. If the enemy does not fulfill its commitments, the Strait of Hormuz is in our hands.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 马兰迪教授：人们不必担心；我们的谈判团队不会被欺骗 🔹 我们的谈判代表就像导弹发射官。如果敌人不履行承诺，霍尔木兹海峡就在我们手中。
